mnemonics: Ljung-Box: Like a Judge Banging a Gavel, it Officially eXamines (LJ-BOX) the residuals for leftover patterns.
keyPoints: Check that residuals are white noise (no autocorrelation).
Verify residuals are approximately normally distributed.
commonMistakes: Failing to check for autocorrelation in residuals, leading to a mis-specified model.
Ignoring heteroscedasticity (non-constant variance), which invalidates statistical tests.
Overlooking outliers or structural breaks that the model did not capture.
